title: RION Introduction
summary: RION is a fast, compact, versatile, binary data format. RION was designed for data exchange, but works fine as a data storage format too. The RION introduction has been extended and improved.
content: RION is a fast, compact, versatile, binary data format. RION was designed for data exchange, but works fine as a data storage format too. The RION introduction has been extended and improved.
